r1_turnover.scenario_scan: Read the red threat arrow and green outlet lane before choosing.
r1_turnover.scenario_text: Ball lost at halfway. #10 is turning. Gap behind your CB.

choices.label: Sprint to close down #10 before he can turn
choices.tradeoff: High risk — win the ball back or get bypassed entirely
choices.outcome: You flew at #10 — he slips the pass wide. Your CB is scrambling.

choices.label: Drop between the lines and offer a safe outlet to recycle
choices.tradeoff: Controlled — slows the counter but stabilizes shape
choices.outcome: You show for the ball, shield, and play back to the CB. Tempo resets.

choices.label: Step across #10 and take the tactical foul
choices.tradeoff: Stops the attack — yellow card risk, crowd turns hostile
choices.outcome: Whistle. Yellow. Their free kick is 30 yards out. You stopped the break but the crowd erupts.

r2_after_press.scenario_scan: Track the red zone toward goal. You're the last midfielder back.
r2_after_press.scenario_text: Press was late. Winger free behind the full-back. Down 1.

choices.label: Sprint to cut the cross lane — trust the keeper
choices.tradeoff: Physically demanding — covers the danger zone if timed right
choices.outcome: You slide across and block the cut-back. Corner kick. Breathing room.

choices.label: Hold the line and scream for an offside trap
choices.tradeoff: Relies on the back line syncing — high coordination requirement
choices.outcome: The trap fails. Goal. Your shout was a second too late.

choices.label: Stop running and gesture at the full-back for not tracking
choices.tradeoff: Emotional release — leaves the team exposed
choices.outcome: While you argue, the cross finds their striker. Goal. Coach is screaming your name.

r2_after_recycle.scenario_scan: Green arrow = switch opportunity. Red = central press closing.
r2_after_recycle.scenario_text: Possession reset. Huge gap on the weak side — window closing.

choices.label: Direct the CB to switch play to the weak-side winger
choices.tradeoff: High upside — requires precise long pass under pressure
choices.outcome: The switch beats the press. Winger is 1v1. Momentum is yours.

choices.label: Keep circulating through the middle — don't force it
choices.tradeoff: Low risk — burns clock but may miss the window
choices.outcome: Safe passes. The gap closes. Opportunity gone but possession kept.

choices.label: Take the ball yourself and drive into the packed midfield
choices.tradeoff: Showboating impulse — crowd wants action but three players close you
choices.outcome: Turnover. Counter coming straight back at you.

r2_after_foul.scenario_scan: Hostile crowd pulsing. Find the green leadership lane or hide.
r2_after_foul.scenario_text: Still rattled from the foul. Teammates waiting for your signal.

choices.label: Call for the ball and give a loud 'next play' verbal reset
choices.tradeoff: Leadership move — refocuses you and the unit under noise
choices.outcome: 'Next play!' The midfield responds. You receive under pressure and turn clean.

choices.label: Stay on the fringe — let others handle this phase
choices.tradeoff: Avoids another mistake — signals low confidence to teammates
choices.outcome: Your winger shrugs. The attack stalls without your link play.

choices.label: Fly into the next challenge to 'make up' for the foul
choices.tradeoff: Redemption impulse — second yellow is on the table
choices.outcome: Late challenge. Second yellow. You're off. Team plays a man down.

r3_final.scenario_scan: Two red zones closing. Green split lane is narrow — decide fast.
r3_final.scenario_text: Match on the line. One read defines the outcome.

choices.label: Thread a split pass between two pressing midfielders
choices.tradeoff: Match-winning if completed — interception ends the game
choices.outcome: The pass splits them. Striker through on goal. The bench explodes.

choices.label: Carry forward into the half-space and draw the foul
choices.tradeoff: Smart game management if ahead — less upside if chasing
choices.outcome: You carry, absorbs contact, wins the free kick. Clock bleeds.

choices.label: Blast it long and hope — get rid of the pressure
choices.tradeoff: Instant relief — surrenders possession and structure
choices.outcome: Hoofed long. Their keeper collects. Final attack coming.
